<!-- Thanks for contributing to the Lupid SDK! -->

## What & why

<!-- What does this change and why? Link any related issue. -->

## Checklist

- [ ] `npm run typecheck` / `npm run lint` / `npm test` pass locally
- [ ] Added/updated tests for the change
- [ ] No secrets or PII in code, tests, or fixtures (CI runs `gitleaks`)
- [ ] Edge-safe: no new static `node:*`/`fs`/`path` imports in files reachable from `index.ts`
- [ ] All commits are signed off (`git commit -s` — [DCO](../CONTRIBUTING.md#developer-certificate-of-origin))
- [ ] I have read the [Code of Conduct](../CODE_OF_CONDUCT.md)
